message:
feat(docs): Create comprehensive RFC_Mesh_Native_Protocol_V2 mega-document

Integrates all clever ideas from four source RFCs into one cohesive vision:
- RFC_Mesh_Native_Protocol.md (mesh-native concepts)
- RFC_Universal_Fungibility.md (foundational primitives)
- RFC_Sovereign_Mesh.md (Tailscale integration)
- RFC_RaptorQ_Integration.md (fountain code details)

Key content includes:
- Three Axioms (Universal Fungibility, Authenticated Mesh, Explicit Authority)
- Complete Rust implementations for ObjectId, EpochId, SymbolEnvelope
- MeshNode, MeshCapability, DistributedState with gossip layer
- Device-aware execution planning with scoring algorithms
- Computation migration and checkpointing
- Full security model (Byzantine tolerance, source diversity, defense-in-depth)
- Tailscale deep integration (ACL generation, zone-to-tag mapping)
- RaptorQ epoch buffers and multipath symbol delivery
- Implementation phases and crate structure (fcp-raptorq, fcp-tailscale, fcp-mesh)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
